name: 圣光爆破
description: 在自己有圣盾时，对一个一格以内的一个敌人造成自身攻击力100%的真实伤害并击退两格
code: function executeSkill(context) { const caster = context.piece; const battle = context.battle; const hasDivineShield = caster.statusTags && caster.statusTags.some(tag => tag.id === 'divine-shield'); if (!hasDivineShield) { return { success: false, message: '需要拥有圣盾才能使用此技能' }; } const target = selectTarget({ type: 'piece', range: 1, filter: 'enemy' }); if (!target || target.needsTargetSelection) { return target; } const damage = caster.attack; const damageResult = dealDamage(caster, target, damage, 'true', battle, context.skill.id); removeStatusEffectById(caster.instanceId, 'divine-shield'); let pushMessage = ''; const dx = target.x - caster.x; const dy = target.y - caster.y; let pushX = 0, pushY = 0; if (Math.abs(dx) > Math.abs(dy)) { pushX = dx > 0 ? 1 : -1; } else { pushY = dy > 0 ? 1 : -1; } let finalX = target.x; let finalY = target.y; for (let i = 0; i < 2; i++) { const nextX = finalX + pushX; const nextY = finalY + pushY; const mapWidth = battle.map.width || 10; const mapHeight = battle.map.height || 10; if (nextX < 0 || nextX >= mapWidth || nextY < 0 || nextY >= mapHeight) { break; } const tile = battle.map.tiles.find(t => t.x === nextX && t.y === nextY); if (!tile || tile.props.walkable === false) { break; } const occupied = battle.pieces && battle.pieces.some(p => p.x === nextX && p.y === nextY && p.currentHp > 0 && p.instanceId !== target.instanceId); if (occupied) { break; } finalX = nextX; finalY = nextY; } if (finalX !== target.x || finalY !== target.y) { target.x = finalX; target.y = finalY; pushMessage = '并将其击退到(' + finalX + ',' + finalY + ')'; } return { message: caster.name + '使用圣光爆破对' + target.name + '造成' + damageResult.damage + '点真实伤害' + pushMessage, success: true }; }
previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { const damage = piece.attack; return { description: '消耗自己的圣盾，对1格内一个敌人造成' + damage + '点真实伤害并击退2格', expectedValues: { damage: damage } }; }
